title: tooling: add post-merge CI audit helper
notes: Added a read-only post-merge main CI audit helper. The actual PR diff (changed_files) includes the test file tests/test_audit_main_ci_for_head.py, which is in scope for task-004 (narrow_code_fix) but is forbidden by the task-002 (report_only_tool) allowed_files pattern. The narrower scoped_files field lists the file that fits inside the task-002 allowed_files pattern. scope_clean is false here because the script's scope check uses the full changed_files, not scoped_files. human_cleanup_required=true because Codex raised P2 review threads that required manual stale-thread resolution before merge.
